Terminal_Metabolite_Function.reason: Results show melatonin enhances cotton resistance to V. dahliae and promotes lignin and gossypol accumulation after infection.

Terminal_Metabolite_Accumulation_Site.reason: Melatonin levels were measured in leaves, stems, and roots, including reductions after GhSNAT1 silencing.

Core_Phenotypic_Effect.reason: VIGS silencing of GhSNAT1 reduced melatonin, increased susceptibility to V. dahliae, reduced lignin and gossypol accumulation after infection, and exogenous melatonin restored the phenotype.

Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene.reason: Each listed point matches Results: homolog identification/complementation, reduced melatonin in VIGS plants, higher disease index and fungal biomass, reduced pathway gene expression and lignin/gossypol, and rescue by exogenous melatonin.

Core_Validation_Method.reason: All listed methods are described in Results/Methods: homolog identification, Arabidopsis complementation, TRV-VIGS, qPCR/RT-PCR, HPLC-MS melatonin assay, disease index, fungal biomass qPCR, lignin/gossypol measurements, and melatonin rescue.

Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species.reason: Expression was examined in leaves, stems, and roots, and the D-subgenome homolog was stated to have higher expression.

Environment_or_Treatment_Factor.reason: Core experiments involved V. dahliae inoculation and exogenous melatonin pretreatment at 25 μM.

Breeding_or_Engineering_Application_Valu.reason: The paper suggests melatonin-mediated immunity may aid breeding strategies, but it does not explicitly propose GhSNAT1 stacking or direct engineering use.

Potential_Tradeoffs.reason: The paper does not report growth/yield penalties, but the explicit statement about no penalty is not demonstrated.

Omics_Data.reason: RNA-seq was performed on the Illumina HiSeq4000 platform; no public accession is provided in the paper.

Other_Important_Info.reason: This accurately summarizes the paper's framing of GhSNAT1 as a melatonin biosynthesis gene acting upstream of lignin/gossypol-associated defense responses.
